# platformFilesRename

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformFilesRename

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformFilesRenameMutation(); mutate({ input: { pFileId: '<UUID>', pNewFilename: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformFilesRenameMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformFilesRenameMutation();
mutate({ input: { pFileId: '<UUID>', pNewFilename: '<String>' } });
```
